CurrentIssues.ID: ClassOrdering:ComponentsRegistryDSL.kt$EscrowDSL$var diskspace: Any? = escrow.diskSpaceRequirement.orElse(null) set(value) { when (value) { null -> { escrow.setDiskspaceRequirement(value) } is Number -> { escrow.setDiskspaceRequirement(value.toLong()) } is String -> { var multiplier = 1 if (value.endsWith("KB") || value.endsWith("K")) { multiplier = 1024 } else if (value.endsWith("MB") || value.endsWith("M")) { multiplier = 1024 * 1024 } else if (value.endsWith("GB") || value.endsWith("G")) { multiplier = 1024 * 1024 * 1024 } escrow.setDiskspaceRequirement(value.replace(Regex("(KB)|(K)|(MB)|(M)|(GB)|(G)"), "").toLong() * multiplier) } else -> { throw IllegalArgumentException("Not supported type " + value::class.java) } } field = value }
